title: Mug Buckets
body:
Small texture pack by CreativeArtSpace and yo314159at that replaces buckets with mugs


  • (Bucket, Water Bucket, Lava Bucket, Powder Snow Bucket, Milk Bucket, Bucket of Pufferfish, Bucket of Salmon, Bucket of Cod, Bucket of Tropical Fish, Bucket of Axolotl, Bucket of Tadpole)

By default, the pack includes different axolotl variations if the version supports it. If this is unwanted behaviour, you should be able to use an older version
OUTDATED - Mod support

  • All vanilla buckets
  • Axolotl Bucket Fix and More Axolotl Variants Mod (Every vanilla axolotl variation and all new variations from MAVM)

  • All vanilla buckets
  • Quark (Slime in a Bucket)
  • Botania (Extrapolated Bucket)
  • Aquaculture 2 (All new fish in buckets)

Might add support for more mods, depending on demand.

Feel free to request a version port @yo314159at if I haven't made it already.
